rejection_reason: The single-variable Layer 2 confirmation-days hypothesis is rejected because no tested confirmation-days variant passed the locked minimum criteria, so there is no basis to reopen the confirmation-days range.
what_this_result_means: Entry-signal persistence alone did not produce a variant that cleared the locked OOS, holdout, drawdown, and trade-count gates, so the next refinement should remain inside Layer 2 entry quality but move to a different lever family rather than recycle the rejected confirmation-days path.
